Name: UCameraModifier_CameraShake
Description:
A UCameraModifier_CameraShake is a camera modifier that can apply a UCameraShake to 
  the owning camera.

Variables.Name: SplitScreenShakeScale
Variables.Description: Scaling factor applied to all camera shakes in when in splitscreen mode. Normally used to reduce shaking, since shakes feel more intense in a smaller viewport.
